topic: Germany 7-1 Curaçao — the smallest nation ever scored on a four-time world champion
subject: livano-comenencia

hook.spoken_hook: A nation of 156 thousand just scored on Germany.

scenes.voiceover: A nation of 156 thousand just scored at a World Cup.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient burst, bold white condensed '156,000', a tiny island silhouette glowing gold against a vast dark stadium. Premium broadcast feel, 9:16. No faces.

scenes.voiceover: Curaçao — the smallest nation ever at a World Cup. They qualified undefeated. Their reward? Germany.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black bg, gold map pin marking a tiny Caribbean island, white condensed caption 'SMALLEST NATION EVER', scale-of-the-moment mood. 9:16, no faces.

scenes.voiceover: Germany did Germany things, and hit the front.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black and gold, German eagle crest abstracted in gold, momentum lines forward. No real face. 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Then Livano Comenencia struck. One-one — level with Germany.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Explosive gold confetti over deep black, white condensed '1-1' flashing, an island silhouette erupting. Pure shock-joy. 9:16, no faces.

scenes.voiceover: Then Germany answered, with seven. We've seen that scoreline before.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Relentless gold goal-flash sequence on black, '7-1' stamped bold white, wave after wave of energy. Broadcast-premium. 9:16, no faces.

scenes.voiceover: Germany top the group, Curaçao bottom — but they leave with history. Heroes, or out of their depth?
scenes.graphic_prompt: Clean black-and-gold ranked group table, white condensed type, the leader row glowing gold. Broadcast standings card. 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: TikiTakaFootyTV — every World Cup story, every day. Subscribe.

cta: Subscribe for your daily World Cup story — every match, every day

thumbnail.concept: A tiny gold island silhouette dwarfed by a giant German eagle shadow, '1-1' flashing in bold white, deep black + gold. Curiosity-first, no faces, no broadcast imagery.

youtube_title: Germany 7-1 Curaçao: The Smallest Nation EVER Just Scored at the World Cup
youtube_description:
Curaçao — an island of ~156,000 people, the smallest nation ever to reach a men's World Cup — scored their first-ever World Cup goal through Livano Comenencia to briefly level it 1-1 before Germany answered with seven. Germany 7-1 Curaçao, Group E, NRG Stadium Houston, 14 June 2026. Heroes or out of their depth? #WorldCup2026

No broadcast footage — original graphics, voiceover, and free-licensed imagery only.
instagram_caption: 156,000 people. One goal on Germany. History made. Curaçao went down 7-1 but they SCORED on a four-time world champion — and they made the World Cup at all. Heroes, or out of their depth? Tell me what that goal meant to you 🇨🇼 Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
tiktok_caption: The smallest nation EVER just scored on Germany 🇨🇼 7-1 but make history first. Heroes or out of their depth? Tell me what that goal meant 👇
